history.note: Prior-session fleet — productization, full local deployment, and the parity + knowledge capstones (all shipped). Retired; not part of the current redesign work.

progress.basis: Overall % and per-track % are DERIVED from the task tracker (done=100%, in-progress=50%, pending=0%) — they auto-resync whenever tasks are updated, so the number can't lag scope. Remaining hours/sessions scale off the same remaining-work ratio. All ESTIMATES; the measured signal is commit velocity (below).
